title: EMR-ACH Article Record
description: Unified article record produced by scripts/unify_articles.py from any of the per-benchmark fetchers (NYT, Guardian, Google News, GDELT DOC, Finnhub, yfinance, SEC EDGAR, GDELT KG). One record per JSONL line.

text.description: Trafilatura-extracted body text. May be empty for title-only fetches.

provenance.description: Pipe-separated tags from each fetcher that produced this URL (e.g. 'gdelt-cameo|nyt'). Records reachable from multiple fetchers retain the union.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag, lowercased. 'und' if unknown.

summary.description: Optional one-sentence summary if produced upstream.

source_type.description: Coarse channel taxonomy. 'filing' marks SEC EDGAR records that should be down-weighted vs editorial news in evidence aggregation.
